rationale: The formal EU accession launch for Ukraine and Moldova is directly relevant to Romania's eastern neighborhood and Black Sea security; Iran peace signals offer modest energy price relief.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: For Romania, formal EU accession for neighboring Moldova and Ukraine directly improves regional stability and long-term security on its eastern border and the Black Sea.

top_events.title: Iran signals Hormuz reopening if deal reached
top_events.summary: A potential Iran deal could ease energy prices for Romanian households, offering indirect economic relief amid ongoing cost-of-living pressures.

top_events.title: UAE to unlock frozen Iranian funds amid US ceasefire push
top_events.summary: Progress toward an Iran ceasefire reduces regional instability that could affect Black Sea energy transit routes and broader EU market stability.
